sqlMap.update: UPDATE TD_USER SET USERNAME = #[username], EMAIL = #[email], MOBILE_TEL1 = #[phone], STATUS = #[status], LOCKED = #[locked], LOCK_TIME = #[lockTime], LAST_LOGIN_TIME = #[lastLoginTime], UPDATED_TIME = #[updatedTime], UPDATED_BY = #[updatedBy] WHERE "USER_ID" = #[userId]
sqlMap.delete: UPDATE TD_USER SET STATUS = 'DELETED', UPDATED_TIME = now() WHERE "USER_ID" = #[userId]
sqlMap.select: SELECT "USER_ID" as user_id, "USERNAME" as username, "PASSWORD" as password, "EMAIL" as email, "MOBILE_TEL1" as phone, "STATUS" as status, "LOCKED" as locked, "LOCK_TIME" as lock_time, "LAST_LOGIN_TIME" as last_login_time, "LOGIN_IP" as login_ip, "LOGIN_COUNT" as login_count, "REAL_NAME" as real_name, "CREATED_TIME" as created_time, "CREATED_BY" as created_by, "UPDATED_TIME" as updated_time, "UPDATED_BY" as updated_by FROM TD_USER WHERE 1=1 #if($keyword) AND ("USERNAME" LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%') OR "EMAIL" LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%')) #end #if($status) AND "STATUS" = #[status] #end ORDER BY "CREATED_TIME" DESC
